name: jellyfin
title: Jellyfin
description: Free software media system that puts you in control of your media. Stream movies, TV shows, music, and more to any device.

name: nextcloud
title: Nextcloud
description: Self-hosted productivity platform. File sync, calendars, contacts, email, collaborative editing, and more.

name: home-assistant
title: Home Assistant
description: Open-source home automation platform. Control and automate your smart home devices from a single, local interface.

name: immich
title: Immich
description: High-performance self-hosted photo and video management. ML-powered search, facial recognition, and automatic organization.

name: gitea
title: Gitea
description: Lightweight, self-hosted Git service. Private repositories, issue tracking, code review, CI/CD, and package registry.
